title: Board Notifications - Pause/Mute for time period

posts.author: tgrossutti (Thomas Grossutti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would love to see an option to “pause” or mute board notifications temporarily. Far too often, we’ve disabled notifications on a specific board when testing or making modifications to automations or workflows, only to forget to reenable them after. This has caused missed notifications for important operational activities. It would be great if there were an option to mute for a specific amount of time, ex. 30 minutes, 1 hour, 2 hours, 1 day etc.

What are you trying to achieve

I feel this would be a handy feature to add, so as not to risk missing critical notifications.
